tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename shared types and schemas from Pulse to Tasks
tasks.description:
Rename all Pulse-related types, schemas, and interfaces in `packages/shared/src/schemas.ts` and `packages/shared/src/relay-envelope-schemas.ts`.

## Changes in `packages/shared/src/schemas.ts`

Rename the following identifiers:

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `PulseScheduleStatusSchema` | `TaskStatusSchema` |
| `PulseScheduleStatus` | `TaskStatus` (note: there is already a `TaskStatus` type for session tasks — it must be renamed first to `SessionTaskStatus` or removed if unused) |
| `PulseRunStatusSchema` | `TaskRunStatusSchema` |
| `PulseRunStatus` | `TaskRunStatus` |
| `PulseRunTriggerSchema` | `TaskRunTriggerSchema` |
| `PulseRunTrigger` | `TaskRunTrigger` |
| `PulseScheduleSchema` | `TaskSchema` |
| `PulseSchedule` | `Task` |
| `PulseRunSchema` | `TaskRunSchema` |
| `PulseRun` | `TaskRun` |
| `PulsePresetSchema` | `TaskTemplateSchema` |
| `PulsePreset` | `TaskTemplate` |
| `CreateScheduleRequestSchema` | `CreateTaskRequestSchema` |
| `UpdateScheduleRequestSchema` | `UpdateTaskRequestSchema` |
| `ListRunsQuerySchema` | `ListTaskRunsQuerySchema` |
| `CreateScheduleInput` | `CreateTaskInput` |
| `CreateScheduleRequest` | `CreateTaskRequest` |
| `UpdateScheduleRequest` | `UpdateTaskRequest` |
| `ListRunsQuery` | `ListTaskRunsQuery` |

Also update the `.openapi()` display names to match (e.g., `.openapi('PulseSchedule')` becomes `.openapi('Task')`).

**IMPORTANT:** There is an existing `TaskStatus` type at line ~24 of schemas.ts used for session tasks (`'pending' | 'in_progress' | 'completed'`). This collides with the Pulse rename. Rename the existing session task status to `SessionTaskStatus` / `SessionTaskStatusSchema` and update all references (search for `TaskStatus` and `TaskStatusSchema` across the codebase — primarily used in session-related code).

## Changes in `packages/shared/src/relay-envelope-schemas.ts`

Rename:
- `PulseDispatchPayloadSchema` -> `TaskDispatchPayloadSchema`
- `PulseDispatchPayload` -> `TaskDispatchPayload`
- Update `.openapi('PulseDispatchPayload')` -> `.openapi('TaskDispatchPayload')`
- Inside the schema, rename `scheduleId` field to `taskId` and `scheduleName` field to `taskName`
- Update the `type` literal from `'pulse_dispatch'` to `'task_dispatch'`

## Changes in `packages/shared/src/transport.ts`

Rename the Transport interface methods:

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `listSchedules()` | `listTasks()` |
| `createSchedule(opts)` | `createTask(opts)` |
| `updateSchedule(id, opts)` | `updateTask(id, opts)` |
| `deleteSchedule(id)` | `deleteTask(id)` |
| `triggerSchedule(id)` | `triggerTask(id)` |
| `listRuns(opts?)` | `listTaskRuns(opts?)` |
| `getRun(id)` | `getTaskRun(id)` |
| `cancelRun(id)` | `cancelTaskRun(id)` |
| `getPulsePresets()` | `getTaskTemplates()` |

Update the section comment from `// --- Pulse Scheduler ---` to `// --- Tasks ---`.
Update all TSDoc comments to say "Task" instead of "Pulse schedule".
Update parameter and return types to use the new type names (`Task`, `TaskRun`, `TaskTemplate`, `CreateTaskInput`, `UpdateTaskRequest`, `ListTaskRunsQuery`).

Also update `packages/shared/src/types.ts` re-exports if they reference any of the old names.

## Acceptance Criteria
- No references to `PulseSchedule`, `PulseRun`, `PulsePreset`, `PulseDispatchPayload`, `listSchedules`, `createSchedule`, etc. remain in `packages/shared/src/`
- `pnpm typecheck` will show errors in downstream packages (expected — those are fixed in subsequent tasks)
- The existing session `TaskStatus` has been renamed to `SessionTaskStatus` to avoid collision
tasks.activeForm: Renaming shared types and schemas from Pulse to Tasks

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename DB schema file and Drizzle exports from Pulse to Tasks
tasks.activeForm: Renaming DB schema file from pulse to tasks

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename server service directory and classes from Pulse to Tasks
tasks.description:
Rename the server-side Pulse service directory, files, and class/function identifiers.

## Directory Rename

Rename `apps/server/src/services/pulse/` to `apps/server/src/services/tasks/`.

## File Renames Within the Directory

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `pulse-store.ts` | `task-store.ts` |
| `scheduler-service.ts` | `task-scheduler-service.ts` |
| `pulse-presets.ts` | `task-presets.ts` (temporary — replaced by templates in Phase 3) |
| `pulse-state.ts` | `task-state.ts` |
| `index.ts` | `index.ts` (update exports) |
| `__tests__/pulse-store.test.ts` | `__tests__/task-store.test.ts` |
| `__tests__/scheduler-service.test.ts` | `__tests__/task-scheduler-service.test.ts` |
| `__tests__/pulse-presets.test.ts` | `__tests__/task-presets.test.ts` |

## Class/Function Renames

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `PulseStore` | `TaskStore` |
| `SchedulerService` | `TaskSchedulerService` |
| `buildPulseAppend()` | `buildTaskContext()` |
| Any `pulseStore` variable names | `taskStore` |
| Any `schedulerService` variable names | `taskSchedulerService` or `taskScheduler` |

Update all internal method names that reference "schedule" to reference "task" where it makes the code clearer. For example:
- `createSchedule()` -> `createTask()`
- `updateSchedule()` -> `updateTask()`
- `deleteSchedule()` -> `deleteTask()`
- `getSchedule()` -> `getTask()`
- `listSchedules()` -> `listTasks()`
- `registerSchedule()` -> `registerTask()`

## Update imports across the server

Search for all imports from `services/pulse/` or `../pulse/` within `apps/server/src/` and update to `services/tasks/` or `../tasks/`.

Key files that import from the pulse service:
- `apps/server/src/index.ts` (creates PulseStore and SchedulerService)
- `apps/server/src/routes/pulse.ts` (uses PulseStore and SchedulerService)
- `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/mcp-tools/pulse-tools.ts`
- Any other files referencing pulse services

## Update test files

Update all `describe()` blocks, variable names, and import paths in the renamed test files.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `apps/server/src/services/pulse/` directory no longer exists
- `apps/server/src/services/tasks/` exists with all renamed files
- All class names updated (`TaskStore`, `TaskSchedulerService`)
- All internal imports within `apps/server/` updated
- Test files renamed and updated
- `pnpm typecheck` passes for `@dorkos/server`
tasks.activeForm: Renaming server service directory and classes from Pulse to Tasks

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename server route file and API paths from Pulse to Tasks
tasks.description:
Rename the Express route file and update all API path prefixes from `/api/pulse/` to `/api/tasks/`.

## File Rename

Rename `apps/server/src/routes/pulse.ts` to `apps/server/src/routes/tasks.ts`.

## Function Rename

Rename `createPulseRouter()` to `createTasksRouter()`.

## Route Path Updates

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `GET /api/pulse/schedules` | `GET /api/tasks` |
| `POST /api/pulse/schedules` | `POST /api/tasks` |
| `PATCH /api/pulse/schedules/:id` | `PATCH /api/tasks/:id` |
| `DELETE /api/pulse/schedules/:id` | `DELETE /api/tasks/:id` |
| `POST /api/pulse/schedules/:id/trigger` | `POST /api/tasks/:id/trigger` |
| `GET /api/pulse/runs` | `GET /api/tasks/runs` |
| `GET /api/pulse/runs/:id` | `GET /api/tasks/runs/:id` |
| `POST /api/pulse/runs/:id/cancel` | `POST /api/tasks/runs/:id/cancel` |
| `GET /api/pulse/presets` | `GET /api/tasks/templates` |

Note the flattening: `/api/pulse/schedules` becomes `/api/tasks` (not `/api/tasks/tasks`). The schedules sub-path is dropped since tasks ARE the top-level resource now.

## Update route registration in `apps/server/src/index.ts`

Change the import and mount point:
```typescript
// Before:
import { createPulseRouter } from './routes/pulse.js';
app.use('/api/pulse', createPulseRouter(store, scheduler));

// After:
import { createTasksRouter } from './routes/tasks.js';
app.use('/api/tasks', createTasksRouter(taskStore, taskScheduler));
```

Update the variable names passed to the router factory to match the renamed services from task 1.3.

## Update OpenAPI registry

Update any OpenAPI route registrations in the route file. Change tag from `'Pulse'` to `'Tasks'`. Update operation IDs (e.g., `listSchedules` -> `listTasks`, `createSchedule` -> `createTask`).

## Update the HttpTransport in the client

Update `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/transport/http-transport.ts` to call the new API paths:
- `/api/pulse/schedules` -> `/api/tasks`
- `/api/pulse/runs` -> `/api/tasks/runs`
- `/api/pulse/presets` -> `/api/tasks/templates`

Also update method names to match the renamed Transport interface (from task 1.1).

Update `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/transport/pulse-methods.ts` — rename to `task-methods.ts` and update all method implementations and paths.

## Update DirectTransport

Update `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/direct-transport.ts` and `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/embedded-mode-stubs.ts` — rename method stubs from `listSchedules` etc. to `listTasks` etc.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `apps/server/src/routes/pulse.ts` no longer exists
- `apps/server/src/routes/tasks.ts` exists with renamed router factory
- All API paths use `/api/tasks/` prefix
- OpenAPI tags and operation IDs updated
- Client HttpTransport updated to call new paths
- Client DirectTransport stubs updated
- `pulse-methods.ts` renamed to `task-methods.ts`
tasks.activeForm: Renaming server route file and API paths from Pulse to Tasks

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename MCP tools file and tool identifiers from Pulse to Tasks
tasks.description:
Rename the MCP tools file for the Claude Code runtime and update all tool names and descriptions.

## File Rename

Rename `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/mcp-tools/pulse-tools.ts` to `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/mcp-tools/task-tools.ts`.

## Tool Name Renames

Update all MCP tool definitions inside the file. The tool names exposed to agents change:

| Current Tool Name | New Tool Name |
|---|---|
| `pulse_list_schedules` (or similar) | `tasks_list` |
| `pulse_create_schedule` | `tasks_create` |
| `pulse_update_schedule` | `tasks_update` |
| `pulse_delete_schedule` | `tasks_delete` |
| `pulse_trigger_schedule` | `tasks_trigger` |
| `pulse_list_runs` | `tasks_list_runs` |
| `pulse_get_run` | `tasks_get_run` |
| `pulse_cancel_run` | `tasks_cancel_run` |

Update all tool descriptions to say "task" instead of "schedule" or "pulse schedule".

## Update imports

Update the import in whichever file registers MCP tools (likely `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/mcp-server.ts` or similar) to import from `./mcp-tools/task-tools.js` instead of `./mcp-tools/pulse-tools.js`.

## Update config schema reference

In `packages/shared/src/config-schema.ts`, the MCP tools config has `pulseTools: z.boolean().default(true)`. Rename to `taskTools: z.boolean().default(true)`. Update the default object to include `taskTools` instead of `pulseTools`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pulse-tools.ts` no longer exists
- `task-tools.ts` exists with all renamed tool identifiers
- Tool descriptions reference "task" not "schedule" or "pulse"
- Config schema updated from `pulseTools` to `taskTools`
- All imports updated
tasks.activeForm: Renaming MCP tools file and identifiers from Pulse to Tasks

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename client entity layer from Pulse to Tasks
tasks.description:
Rename the client entity layer directory and all hook files/exports from Pulse to Tasks.

## Directory Rename

Rename `apps/client/src/layers/entities/pulse/` to `apps/client/src/layers/entities/tasks/`.

## File Renames

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `model/use-schedules.ts` | `model/use-tasks.ts` |
| `model/use-runs.ts` | `model/use-task-runs.ts` |
| `model/use-pulse-presets.ts` | `model/use-task-templates.ts` |
| `model/use-pulse-preset-dialog.ts` | `model/use-task-template-dialog.ts` |
| `model/use-pulse-config.ts` | `model/use-task-config.ts` |
| `model/use-completed-run-badge.ts` | `model/use-completed-run-badge.ts` (keep name, update internals) |
| `__tests__/use-schedules.test.tsx` | `__tests__/use-tasks.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/use-runs.test.tsx` | `__tests__/use-task-runs.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/use-pulse-preset-dialog.test.ts` | `__tests__/use-task-template-dialog.test.ts` |
| `__tests__/use-pulse-config.test.tsx` | `__tests__/use-task-config.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/use-completed-run-badge.test.ts` | `__tests__/use-completed-run-badge.test.ts` |

## Hook Renames

Inside each file, rename the exported hooks:

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `useSchedules()` | `useTasks()` |
| `useCreateSchedule()` | `useCreateTask()` |
| `useUpdateSchedule()` | `useUpdateTask()` |
| `useDeleteSchedule()` | `useDeleteTask()` |
| `useTriggerSchedule()` | `useTriggerTask()` |
| `useRuns()` | `useTaskRuns()` |
| `usePulsePresets()` | `useTaskTemplates()` |
| `usePulsePresetDialog()` | `useTaskTemplateDialog()` |
| `usePulseConfig()` | `useTaskConfig()` |

Update all TanStack Query keys from `['pulse', ...]` or `['schedules', ...]` to `['tasks', ...]` and `['taskRuns', ...]`.

Update Transport method calls inside each hook to use the renamed methods (e.g., `transport.listSchedules()` -> `transport.listTasks()`).

## Update barrel export

Update `apps/client/src/layers/entities/tasks/index.ts` (renamed from `pulse/index.ts`) to export all hooks with their new names.

## Update all consumers

Search for all imports from `@/layers/entities/pulse` across the client codebase and update to `@/layers/entities/tasks`. Update hook call sites to use new names.

Key consumers include:
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/pulse/` (all UI components)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/` (SchedulesView, SessionSidebar)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-attention/` (NeedsAttentionSection, FailedRunDetailSheet)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-status/` (SubsystemCard, use-subsystem-status)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/` (PulsePresetsStep)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/`
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/` (app-store)

## Acceptance Criteria
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/pulse/` directory no longer exists
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/tasks/` exists with all renamed files
- All hook names updated
- All TanStack Query keys updated
- All consumer imports updated
- All Transport method calls updated
- Test files renamed and updated
tasks.activeForm: Renaming client entity layer from Pulse to Tasks

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Rename client feature layer from Pulse to Tasks
tasks.description:
Rename the client feature layer directory and all component files/exports from Pulse to Tasks.

## File Renames

| `ui/PulsePanel.tsx` | `ui/TaskPanel.tsx` (temporary — removed in Phase 4) |
| `ui/ScheduleRow.tsx` | `ui/TaskRow.tsx` |
| `ui/ScheduleFormInner.tsx` | `ui/TaskFormInner.tsx` |
| `ui/CreateScheduleDialog.tsx` | `ui/CreateTaskDialog.tsx` |
| `ui/RunHistoryPanel.tsx` | `ui/TaskRunHistoryPanel.tsx` |

| `ui/PresetGallery.tsx` | `ui/TaskTemplateGallery.tsx` |

| `ui/PulseEmptyState.tsx` | `ui/TaskEmptyState.tsx` |
| `ui/AgentPicker.tsx` | `ui/AgentPicker.tsx` (keep name) |
| `ui/TimezoneCombobox.tsx` | `ui/TimezoneCombobox.tsx` (keep name) |
| `ui/format-cron.ts` | `ui/format-cron.ts` (keep name) |
| `ui/use-spotlight.ts` | `ui/use-spotlight.ts` (keep name) |

## Test File Renames

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `__tests__/PulsePanel.test.tsx` | `__tests__/TaskPanel.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/ScheduleRow.test.tsx` | `__tests__/TaskRow.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/CreateScheduleDialog.test.tsx` | `__tests__/CreateTaskDialog.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/RunHistoryPanel.test.tsx` | `__tests__/TaskRunHistoryPanel.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/ScheduleBuilder.test.tsx` | `__tests__/TaskScheduleBuilder.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/PresetGallery.test.tsx` | `__tests__/TaskTemplateGallery.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/PresetCard.test.tsx` | `__tests__/TaskTemplateCard.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/PulseEmptyState.test.tsx` | `__tests__/TaskEmptyState.test.tsx` |
| `__tests__/AgentPicker.test.tsx` | `__tests__/AgentPicker.test.tsx` (keep) |

## Component Renames

Inside each file, rename the exported component:

| Current | New |
|---|---|
| `PulsePanel` | `TaskPanel` |
| `ScheduleRow` | `TaskRow` |
| `ScheduleFormInner` | `TaskFormInner` |
| `CreateScheduleDialog` | `CreateTaskDialog` |
| `RunHistoryPanel` | `TaskRunHistoryPanel` |
| `ScheduleBuilder` | `TaskScheduleBuilder` |
| `PresetGallery` | `TaskTemplateGallery` |
| `PresetCard` | `TaskTemplateCard` |
| `PulseEmptyState` | `TaskEmptyState` |

Update all internal references to use the renamed entity hooks (from task 1.6): `useSchedules()` -> `useTasks()`, etc.

## Update barrel export

Update `apps/client/src/layers/features/tasks/index.ts` to export all components with new names.

## Update all consumers

Search for all imports from `@/layers/features/pulse` and update to `@/layers/features/tasks`. Key consumers:

- `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SchedulesView.tsx` (imports schedule components)
- `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/app-layout/model/wrappers/PulseDialogWrapper.tsx` (rename file too)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/ui/PulsePresetsStep.tsx` (rename file too)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/feature-promos/ui/dialogs/SchedulesDialog.tsx`
- Various dev playground/showcase files

Also rename:
- `PulseDialogWrapper.tsx` -> `TaskDialogWrapper.tsx`
- `PulsePresetsStep.tsx` -> `TaskTemplatesStep.tsx`
- `SchedulesDialog.tsx` -> `TasksDialog.tsx` (in feature-promos)
- `SchedulesView.tsx` -> update references
- `PulseShowcases.tsx` -> `TaskShowcases.tsx`

## Acceptance Criteria
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/pulse/` directory no longer exists
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/tasks/` exists with all renamed files
- All component names updated
- All consumer imports and references updated
- Associated files in other feature directories renamed
- Test files renamed and describe blocks updated
tasks.activeForm: Renaming client feature layer from Pulse to Tasks

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Remove PULSE_ENABLED feature flag and update UI labels
tasks.description:
Remove the `PULSE_ENABLED` env var, `--pulse` CLI flag, and all conditional checks. Update UI labels from "Pulse"/"Schedules" to "Tasks".

## Remove `PULSE_ENABLED` env var

In `apps/server/src/env.ts` (line 27), remove:
```typescript
DORKOS_PULSE_ENABLED: boolFlag,
```

In `apps/server/src/index.ts`, find the conditional that gates scheduler initialization on `PULSE_ENABLED` and remove the condition — the scheduler (now `TaskSchedulerService`) should always initialize.

## Remove `--pulse` CLI flag

In `packages/cli/src/cli.ts`:
- Remove the `--pulse` option from the CLI argument parser (around line 75)
- Remove the lines that set `process.env.DORKOS_PULSE_ENABLED` based on `values.pulse` (around lines 190-192)
- Remove the fallback that reads from `cfgMgr.getDot('scheduler.enabled')`

## Remove config schema references

In `packages/shared/src/config-schema.ts`:
- If the `scheduler` config section has an `enabled` boolean, remove it. The scheduler is always on.
- Keep other scheduler config (like `maxConcurrentRuns`) if present.
- Update the `ONBOARDING_STEPS` constant: change `'pulse'` to `'tasks'` in the array (line 12).

## Remove client-side feature gates

Search the client codebase for any `pulseEnabled`, `PULSE_ENABLED`, or feature-gated conditionals that hide Pulse UI. Remove those conditionals so the Tasks UI is always rendered.

Check `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/use-feature-enabled.ts` for any pulse-related feature flags.

## Update UI labels

Across all client components (already renamed in tasks 1.6 and 1.7), ensure:
- All visible strings say "Tasks" not "Pulse" or "Schedules"
- "New Schedule" -> "New Task"
- "Create Schedule" -> "Create Task"
- "Edit Schedule" -> "Edit Task"
- "Delete Schedule" -> "Delete Task"
- Section headers, dialog titles, empty states — all updated

## Update app-store

In `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/app-store.ts` (or the split files `app-store-types.ts`, `app-store-panels.ts`, etc.):
- Rename `pulseBadgeCount` -> `tasksBadgeCount`
- Rename `setPulseBadgeCount` -> `setTasksBadgeCount`
- Update all references in the codebase

## Update sidebar navigation icon

In `DashboardSidebar` or wherever the navigation items are defined:
- Change the import from `HeartPulse` to `Zap` from `lucide-react`
- Change the label from "Pulse" to "Tasks"
- Update the href if it previously pointed to a pulse-related route

## Update `turbo.json` if `DORKOS_PULSE_ENABLED` is listed

Check `turbo.json` for any reference to `DORKOS_PULSE_ENABLED` in `globalPassThroughEnv` or task-level `env` and remove it.

## Acceptance Criteria
- No references to `PULSE_ENABLED`, `--pulse`, or `pulseEnabled` in the codebase
- Scheduler initialization is unconditional
- All visible UI text says "Tasks" not "Pulse" or "Schedules"
- `pulseBadgeCount` renamed to `tasksBadgeCount` everywhere
- Sidebar nav shows Zap icon with "Tasks" label
- Onboarding steps reference `'tasks'` not `'pulse'`
tasks.activeForm: Removing PULSE_ENABLED feature flag and updating UI labels to Tasks

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Update documentation, AGENTS.md, and OpenAPI references for rename
tasks.description:
Update all documentation files, AGENTS.md, contributing guides, and OpenAPI references to reflect the Pulse-to-Tasks rename.

## AGENTS.md

Update `AGENTS.md` at the repo root:
- In the Monorepo Structure section, update any references to `pulse/` directories to `tasks/`
- In the Server section, change `services/pulse/` references to `services/tasks/`, `PulseStore` to `TaskStore`, `SchedulerService` to `TaskSchedulerService`
- Update any route references from `/api/pulse/*` to `/api/tasks/*`
- Update the MCP tools reference from `pulse-tools.ts` to `task-tools.ts`
- Remove mention of `PULSE_ENABLED` if present
- Add mention of the `/tasks` route under Client routing

## Contributing guides

Search all files in `contributing/` for references to "Pulse", "pulse", "schedule", "PulseStore", "SchedulerService" and update:
- `contributing/architecture.md`
- `contributing/api-reference.md`
- `contributing/configuration.md`
- Any other guides that reference the old naming

## OpenAPI docs

Update `docs/api/` MDX files if they reference Pulse endpoints. The OpenAPI-generated docs in `docs/api/api/` may have pulse-related paths — search and update.

## Dev playground

Update dev playground config and section files:
- `apps/client/src/dev/playground-config.ts`
- `apps/client/src/dev/sections/features-sections.ts`
- `apps/client/src/dev/sections/forms-sections.ts`
- `apps/client/src/dev/pages/FeaturesPage.tsx`
- Rename `PulseShowcases.tsx` to `TaskShowcases.tsx` if not already done in 1.7

## Acceptance Criteria
- No references to "Pulse" remain in AGENTS.md (except in git history context)
- Contributing guides updated
- Dev playground references updated
- OpenAPI docs reference the new route paths
tasks.activeForm: Updating documentation and AGENTS.md for Pulse-to-Tasks rename

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Run verification gate for Phase 1 rename
tasks.description:
Run the full verification suite to confirm the Pulse-to-Tasks rename is complete and nothing is broken.

## Commands to run

```bash
pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test -- --run
```

All three must pass.

## Verification checks

1. **Typecheck**: Ensures all renamed types, interfaces, and function signatures are consistent across the monorepo.
2. **Build**: Ensures all apps compile successfully with the new import paths.
3. **Tests**: Ensures all existing tests pass with the renamed identifiers.

## Residual Pulse references

After passing, do a final grep for any remaining "Pulse" or "pulse" references (case-insensitive) excluding:
- DB table name strings (`'pulse_schedules'`, `'pulse_runs'`) — these are intentionally kept
- Git history / changelogs
- `node_modules/`
- `dist/` build outputs

```bash
grep -rni 'pulse' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.md' \
  --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=dist --exclude-dir=.git \
  | grep -v 'pulse_schedules' | grep -v 'pulse_runs' | grep -v 'CHANGELOG'
```

Any remaining references (other than DB table names) indicate incomplete rename and must be fixed before proceeding to Phase 2.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pnpm typecheck` passes with 0 errors
- `pnpm build` succeeds for all apps
- `pnpm test -- --run` passes all tests
- No stray "Pulse" / "pulse" references remain (aside from DB table name strings)

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P2] Add filePath and tags columns to pulse_schedules schema
tasks.description:
Add the `filePath` and `tags` columns to the `pulse_schedules` Drizzle schema and drop existing data.

## Schema Changes

In `packages/db/src/schema/tasks.ts` (renamed from `pulse.ts` in Phase 1), add two columns to the `pulseSchedules` table:

```typescript
export const pulseSchedules = sqliteTable('pulse_schedules', {
  id: text('id').primaryKey(),
  name: text('name').notNull(),
  description: text('description'),
  cron: text('cron'),
  timezone: text('timezone').notNull().default('UTC'),
  prompt: text('prompt').notNull(),
  cwd: text('cwd'),
  agentId: text('agent_id'),
  enabled: integer('enabled', { mode: 'boolean' }).notNull().default(true),
  maxRuntime: integer('max_runtime'),
  permissionMode: text('permission_mode').notNull().default('acceptEdits'),
  status: text('status', {
    enum: ['active', 'paused', 'pending_approval'],
  })
    .notNull()
    .default('active'),
  filePath: text('file_path').notNull(), // NEW — absolute path to the .md file on disk
  tags: text('tags_json').notNull().default('[]'), // NEW — JSON-serialized string[] for filtering
  createdAt: text('created_at').notNull(),
  updatedAt: text('updated_at').notNull(),
});
```

The `filePath` column is `NOT NULL` — every task must be backed by a file. The `tags` column stores a JSON array of strings, defaulting to `'[]'`.

## Drop existing data

This is an alpha project. Create a migration or startup routine that:
1. Drops all rows from `pulse_runs` (references schedule IDs that will no longer exist)
2. Drops all rows from `pulse_schedules`
3. The schema change (adding NOT NULL `filePath`) takes effect on the empty table

If using Drizzle's push mechanism (`drizzle-kit push`), the NOT NULL column on an existing table with data would fail. Dropping data first avoids this.

Alternatively, if the project uses `drizzle-kit push` for schema sync (not formal migrations), simply adding the column and dropping data beforehand via a startup script works.

## Update shared types

In `packages/shared/src/schemas.ts`, add `filePath` and `tags` to the `TaskSchema` (renamed from `PulseScheduleSchema`):

```typescript
export const TaskSchema = z.object({
  // ... existing fields ...
  filePath: z.string(), // absolute path to .md file
  tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
  // ... existing fields ...
});
```

Update the `Task` type (renamed from `PulseSchedule`) to include `filePath: string` and `tags: string[]`.

Update `CreateTaskInput` to include optional `tags?: string[]`.
Update `UpdateTaskRequest` to include optional `tags?: string[]`.

## Update TaskStore

Update `TaskStore` (renamed from `PulseStore` in Phase 1) to include `filePath` and `tags` in all insert/update/select operations. The `tags` field must be JSON-serialized on write and JSON-parsed on read.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pulse_schedules` table has `file_path TEXT NOT NULL` and `tags_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
- Existing schedule and run data is dropped on startup (alpha clean slate)
- `TaskSchema` and `Task` type include `filePath` and `tags`
- `TaskStore` CRUD methods handle `filePath` and `tags` (JSON serialization)
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
tasks.activeForm: Adding filePath and tags columns to pulse_schedules schema

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P2] Add isSystem column to agents schema
tasks.description:
Add the `isSystem` boolean column to the `agents` Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/mesh.ts`.

## Schema Change

In `packages/db/src/schema/mesh.ts`, add the `isSystem` column to the `agents` table:

```typescript
export const agents = sqliteTable('agents', {
  id: text('id').primaryKey(),
  name: text('name').notNull(),
  runtime: text('runtime').notNull(),
  projectPath: text('project_path').notNull().unique(),
  namespace: text('namespace').notNull().default('default'),
  capabilities: text('capabilities_json').notNull().default('[]'),
  entrypoint: text('entrypoint'),
  version: text('version'),
  description: text('description'),
  approver: text('approver'),
  status: text('status', {
    enum: ['active', 'inactive', 'unreachable'],
  })
    .notNull()
    .default('active'),
  scanRoot: text('scan_root').notNull().default(''),
  behaviorJson: text('behavior_json').notNull().default('{"responseMode":"always"}'),
  budgetJson: text('budget_json')
    .notNull()
    .default('{"maxHopsPerMessage":5,"maxCallsPerHour":100}'),
  isSystem: integer('is_system', { mode: 'boolean' }).notNull().default(false), // NEW
  lastSeenAt: text('last_seen_at'),
  lastSeenEvent: text('last_seen_event'),
  persona: text('persona'),
  personaEnabled: integer('persona_enabled', { mode: 'boolean' }).notNull().default(true),
  traitsJson: text('traits_json'),
  conventionsJson: text('conventions_json'),
  color: text('color'),
  icon: text('icon'),
  registeredAt: text('registered_at').notNull(),
  updatedAt: text('updated_at').notNull(),
});
```

## Update shared types

If there is an `AgentManifest` or similar type in `packages/shared/`, add `isSystem?: boolean` to it. The field defaults to `false` so it's optional on input but always present on output.

Search for the agent type definition (likely in `packages/shared/src/mesh-schemas.ts` or similar) and add the field.

## Update MeshCore

In `packages/mesh/`, update the `MeshCore` class and related types to handle the `isSystem` field:
- The `register()` / `registerByPath()` method should accept `isSystem` as an optional field
- The `get()` and `list()` methods should return `isSystem` in the agent data
- The `unregister()` method should check `isSystem` and throw if attempting to unregister a system agent

Update the agent-to-DB serialization and DB-to-agent deserialization to include `isSystem`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `agents` table has `is_system INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0`
- Existing agents are unaffected (default `false`)
- Agent types include `isSystem` field
- MeshCore handles `isSystem` in CRUD operations
- `pnpm typecheck` passes

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P3] Add upsertFromFile, markRemovedBySlug, and getBySlug to TaskStore
tasks.description:
Extend `TaskStore` (renamed from `PulseStore`) with new methods for file-first CRUD operations.

## New methods on TaskStore

Add three new methods to the `TaskStore` class in `apps/server/src/services/tasks/task-store.ts`:

### upsertFromFile()

```typescript
/**
 * Upsert a task from a parsed file definition.
 *
 * Used by the file watcher and reconciler to sync file state into the DB cache.
 * If a task with the same slug (id) exists, it is updated. Otherwise, it is inserted.
 *
 * @param def - Parsed TaskDefinition from a .md file
 */
upsertFromFile(def: TaskDefinition): void {
  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const existing = this.db
    .select()
    .from(pulseSchedules)
    .where(eq(pulseSchedules.id, def.id))
    .get();

  if (existing) {
    this.db
      .update(pulseSchedules)
      .set({
        name: def.meta.name,
        description: def.meta.description ?? null,
        cron: def.meta.cron ?? null,
        timezone: def.meta.timezone,
        prompt: def.prompt,
        cwd: def.meta.cwd ?? null,
        agentId: def.meta.agent ?? null,
        enabled: def.meta.enabled,
        maxRuntime: def.meta.maxRuntime ? parseDuration(def.meta.maxRuntime) : null,
        permissionMode: def.meta.permissions,
        filePath: def.filePath,
        tags: JSON.stringify(def.meta.tags),
        status: def.meta.enabled ? 'active' : 'paused',
        updatedAt: now,
      })
      .where(eq(pulseSchedules.id, def.id))
      .run();
  } else {
    this.db
      .insert(pulseSchedules)
      .values({
        id: def.id,
        name: def.meta.name,
        description: def.meta.description ?? null,
        cron: def.meta.cron ?? null,
        timezone: def.meta.timezone,
        prompt: def.prompt,
        cwd: def.meta.cwd ?? null,
        agentId: def.meta.agent ?? null,
        enabled: def.meta.enabled,
        maxRuntime: def.meta.maxRuntime ? parseDuration(def.meta.maxRuntime) : null,
        permissionMode: def.meta.permissions,
        filePath: def.filePath,
        tags: JSON.stringify(def.meta.tags),
        status: def.meta.enabled ? 'active' : 'paused',
        createdAt: now,
        updatedAt: now,
      })
      .run();
  }
}
```

Note: `parseDuration()` converts a duration string like `"5m"` to milliseconds. Implement this helper:

```typescript
/** Convert a duration string ("5m", "1h", "30s", "2h30m") to milliseconds. */
function parseDuration(dur: string): number {
  let ms = 0;
  const hours = dur.match(/(\d+)h/);
  const minutes = dur.match(/(\d+)m/);
  const seconds = dur.match(/(\d+)s/);
  if (hours) ms += parseInt(hours[1], 10) * 3600000;
  if (minutes) ms += parseInt(minutes[1], 10) * 60000;
  if (seconds) ms += parseInt(seconds[1], 10) * 1000;
  return ms;
}
```

### markRemovedBySlug()

```typescript
/**
 * Mark a task as paused when its file is deleted.
 *
 * The reconciler will clean up entries past the 24h grace period.
 *
 * @param slug - Task slug (filename without .md extension)
 */
markRemovedBySlug(slug: string): void {
  this.db
    .update(pulseSchedules)
    .set({
      status: 'paused',
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    })
    .where(eq(pulseSchedules.id, slug))
    .run();
}
```

### getBySlug()

```typescript
/**
 * Get a task by its filename slug.
 *
 * @param slug - Task slug (filename without .md extension)
 * @returns The task or null if not found
 */
getBySlug(slug: string): Task | null {
  const row = this.db
    .select()
    .from(pulseSchedules)
    .where(eq(pulseSchedules.id, slug))
    .get();
  return row ? this.rowToTask(row) : null;
}
```

The `rowToTask()` helper should parse the `tags` JSON field:
```typescript
private rowToTask(row: InferSelectModel<typeof pulseSchedules>): Task {
  return {
    ...row,
    tags: JSON.parse(row.tags || '[]') as string[],
  };
}
```

Ensure all existing TaskStore list/get methods also use `rowToTask()` for consistent tag parsing.

## Tests

Add tests in `apps/server/src/services/tasks/__tests__/task-store.test.ts`:

1. Test `upsertFromFile()` inserts a new task from a TaskDefinition
2. Test `upsertFromFile()` updates an existing task when called with same slug
3. Test `markRemovedBySlug()` sets status to 'paused'
4. Test `getBySlug()` returns the task
5. Test `getBySlug()` returns null for non-existent slug
6. Test `parseDuration()` converts correctly: `"5m"` -> 300000, `"1h"` -> 3600000, `"30s"` -> 30000, `"2h30m"` -> 9000000
7. Test tags are correctly serialized to JSON on write and parsed on read

## Acceptance Criteria
- `upsertFromFile()` correctly inserts and updates tasks from TaskDefinition objects
- `markRemovedBySlug()` sets status to paused
- `getBySlug()` retrieves tasks by slug
- Tags are JSON-serialized in DB and parsed on read
- Duration strings are correctly converted to milliseconds
- All tests pass
tasks.activeForm: Adding file-first CRUD methods to TaskStore

pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test -- --run

## Manual verification

1. Start the dev server and confirm:
   - Default templates are seeded at `{dorkHome}/tasks/templates/` (4 `.md` files)
   - Global watcher is running (check logs for "Watching" message)
   - Creating a task via API writes a `.md` file to the expected directory
   - Editing the `.md` file on disk updates the task in the API response within seconds
   - Deleting the `.md` file pauses the task
   - `GET /api/tasks/templates` returns the 4 default templates
2. Test the round-trip:
   - `POST /api/tasks` -> check file exists on disk -> modify file -> `GET /api/tasks` shows update
3. Check that the reconciler is running (log output every 5 minutes or trigger manually)

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
- `pnpm build` succeeds
- `pnpm test -- --run` passes
- File-first CRUD works end-to-end
- Watcher detects changes within seconds
- Templates are seeded correctly

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P4] Create TaskRow component with size variants
tasks.description:
Create the standard `TaskRow` component used everywhere tasks are displayed. Evolves from the renamed `TaskRow` (formerly `ScheduleRow`) by adding `size` and `showAgent` props. ## File location `apps/client/src/layers/features/tasks/ui/TaskRow.tsx` This replaces the existing renamed `TaskRow` (which is a direct rename of `ScheduleRow`). The new version has size variants. ## Props interface ```typescript import type { Task } from '@dorkos/shared/schemas'; import type { AgentManifest } from '@dorkos/shared/mesh-schemas'; interface TaskRowProps { task: Task; /** Resolved agent for the task, or null. */ agent?: AgentManifest | null; /** Display size variant. Default: 'default'. */ size?: 'default' | 'compact' | 'minimal'; /** Whether to show the agent column. Default: true. */ showAgent?: boolean; /** Whether the run history panel is expanded (default variant only). */ expanded?: boolean; onToggleExpand?: () => void; onEdit?: () => void; } ``` ## Variant behavior | Variant | Agent column | Cron/schedule info | Tags | Run history expand | Actions | |---|---|---|---|---|---| | `default` | If `showAgent` | Yes | Yes | Yes (collapsible) | Full dropdown: Edit, Run Now, Delete | | `compact` | If `showAgent` | Yes (inline) | No | No | Run button only | | `minimal` | No | No | No | No | None (display only) | ## New features (beyond the old ScheduleRow) ### File path indicator In the expanded state (default variant), show the task's `filePath` as a truncated monospace path below the run history: ```tsx {expanded && task.filePath && (
{task.filePath}
)} ``` ### Tags display Render tag chips below the cron description line when `task.tags.length > 0`: ```tsx {(size === 'default') && task.tags.length > 0 && (
{task.tags.map((tag) => ( {tag} ))}
)} ``` ### System badge If the associated agent has `isSystem: true`, render a "System" chip: ```tsx {agent?.isSystem && ( System )} ``` ### Status indicator Show the task status with appropriate colors: - `active` -> green dot - `paused` -> yellow dot - `pending_approval` -> orange dot ### Next run display For scheduled tasks (with cron), show the computed `nextRun` timestamp in a human-readable relative format (e.g., "in 2 hours"). ## Tests Create `apps/client/src/layers/features/tasks/__tests__/TaskRow.test.tsx`: 1. Test default variant renders all columns (name, cron, agent, tags, actions) 2. Test compact variant renders reduced columns (no tags, no expand, run button only) 3. Test minimal variant renders name only 4. Test `showAgent={false}` hides the agent column 5. Test tags render as badges when present 6. Test system badge renders when agent.isSystem is true 7. Test file path shows in expanded state 8. Test action dropdown has Edit, Run Now, Delete options (default variant) 9. Test status dot color matches task status ## Acceptance Criteria - `TaskRow` renders correctly in all three size variants - `showAgent` prop controls agent column visibility - Tags, file path, system badge, and status dot all render correctly - Actions dropdown works in default variant - Component is exported from the features/tasks barrel - All tests pass

tasks.description:
Update the sidebar navigation to show "Tasks" with the Zap icon and remove the PulsePanel from the session sidebar.

## Sidebar navigation

In `DashboardSidebar` (find the component — likely in `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SessionSidebar.tsx` or `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/app-layout/`):

   - Change the import from `HeartPulse` to `Zap` from `lucide-react`
   - Change the label from "Pulse" / "Schedules" to "Tasks"
   - Change the href to `/tasks`
   - If there was a badge count using `pulseBadgeCount`, update to `tasksBadgeCount`

2. Ensure the nav item is in the correct position. The route order is:
   - Dashboard (`/`)
   - Agents (`/agents`)
   - Tasks (`/tasks`) — NEW position
   - Activity / other routes

## Remove PulsePanel from session sidebar

The `PulsePanel` (now `TaskPanel`) was rendered in the session sidebar. Remove it entirely:

1. In `SessionSidebar` (or wherever `TaskPanel` / `PulsePanel` is rendered), remove the import and rendering of the panel.
2. Remove the sidebar tab that shows "Schedules" / "Pulse" — it should no longer be a sidebar tab.
3. Optionally add a contextual link: "View tasks for this agent" that navigates to `/tasks?agent={agentId}` using TanStack Router's `Link` component.

## Remove SchedulesView

If `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SchedulesView.tsx` exists as a sidebar view, remove it. Tasks are now a top-level page, not a sidebar panel.

Update `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/model/sidebar-contributions.ts` and `use-sidebar-tabs.ts` to remove the schedules/pulse tab contribution.

## Remove PulseDialogWrapper

Remove or update `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/app-layout/model/wrappers/PulseDialogWrapper.tsx` (renamed to `TaskDialogWrapper.tsx` in Phase 1). If this was used to render the `CreateScheduleDialog` from the sidebar, it may need to stay for the `/tasks` page but with updated references.

Update `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/app-layout/model/dialog-contributions.ts` accordingly.

## Update command palette

In `apps/client/src/layers/features/command-palette/`:
- Update palette contributions to navigate to `/tasks` instead of opening a pulse panel
- Update the label from "Pulse" / "Schedules" to "Tasks"
- Update any keyboard shortcuts related to pulse

Check these files:
- `model/palette-contributions.ts`
- `model/use-palette-actions.ts`
- `model/use-palette-items.ts`
- `model/use-global-palette.ts`
- `ui/PaletteRootPage.tsx`

## Update use-pulse-notifications.ts

## Tests

Update sidebar tests to verify:
1. "Tasks" nav item with Zap icon is present
2. Clicking it navigates to `/tasks`
3. No "Pulse" or "Schedules" nav items remain
4. PulsePanel is not rendered in the session sidebar
5. SchedulesView is removed

Update command palette tests:
1. "Tasks" action is available
2. It navigates to `/tasks`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Sidebar shows "Tasks" with Zap icon, navigating to `/tasks`
- PulsePanel / TaskPanel removed from session sidebar

tasks.subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P4] Update all remaining client references and run final verification
tasks.description:
Clean up all remaining Pulse references in client code, update tests, and run the final verification gate.

## Remaining client references

Search the entire client codebase for any remaining references to "Pulse", "pulse", "Schedule" (in the context of task scheduling), and update them:

### Dashboard components
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-status/` — `SystemStatusRow`, `SubsystemCard`, `use-subsystem-status`: Update the health card that shows Pulse status to show "Tasks" status
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-attention/` — `NeedsAttentionSection`, `FailedRunDetailSheet`: Update references from pulse runs to task runs
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-activity/` — `RecentActivityFeed`, `ActivityFeedItem`: Update event type references from pulse to tasks

### Activity and entities
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/activity/` — `activity-types.ts`, `CategoryBadge`, `ActorBadge`: Update pulse category to tasks
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/activity-feed-page/` — filter bar, empty state: Update pulse references

### Agent-related components
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/` — topology elements, `AgentNode`, `NamespaceGroupNode`, `TopologyLegend`: Update pulse references
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/agents-list/` — `AgentRow`, `AgentsList`: Update references to pulse capabilities to tasks
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/` — `CapabilitiesTab`, `ContextTab`, `ConnectionsTab`: Update pulse tool references to task tools

### Onboarding
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/` — Update the onboarding step that was "PulsePresetsStep" to "TaskTemplatesStep". Update the step name in the onboarding flow, progress card, etc.

### Relay components
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/relay/` — `AdapterCard`, `AdapterCardBindings`, `ActivityFeed`: Update pulse dispatch references to task dispatch

### Settings
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/` — `ToolsTab`, `ServerTab`: Update pulse tool configuration references to task tool configuration

### Shared utilities
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/tool-arguments-formatter.tsx`: Update pulse tool name formatting
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/ui-action-dispatcher.ts`: Update pulse action references
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/favicon-utils.ts`: Update pulse status references
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/use-document-title.ts`: Update pulse references
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/use-favicon.ts`: Update pulse status to tasks

### CSS
- `apps/client/src/index.css`: Check for any pulse-specific CSS classes and rename

### Dev/showcase files
- `apps/client/src/dev/` — Update all showcase files, simulator scenarios, section definitions that reference Pulse

## Run comprehensive search

```bash
grep -rni 'pulse\|schedule' apps/client/src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' \
  | grep -v node_modules | grep -v dist | grep -v '.test.' \
  | grep -vi 'taskschedulebuilder\|taskscheduler' \
  | head -100
```

Fix every remaining reference. "Schedule" in the context of cron scheduling is acceptable (e.g., `TaskScheduleBuilder` is fine). "Schedule" meaning "a pulse schedule" must be updated to "task".

## Update tests

Update all remaining test files that reference old naming:
- Dashboard tests
- Activity tests
- Agent tests
- Onboarding tests
- Command palette tests
- Settings tests

## Final verification gate

```bash
pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test -- --run
```

All three must pass.

Do a final comprehensive grep for "Pulse" and "pulse" across the entire repository (excluding DB table names, node_modules, dist, git):

```bash
grep -rni 'pulse' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.md' \
  --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=dist --exclude-dir=.git \
  | grep -v 'pulse_schedules' | grep -v 'pulse_runs' | grep -v CHANGELOG
```

Zero results (aside from DB table name strings) confirms the rename is complete.

## Acceptance Criteria
- No "Pulse" references remain anywhere in the codebase (except DB table name strings)
- All dashboard, activity, agent, onboarding, settings, and relay components updated
- All tests pass
- `pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test -- --run` passes
